'''ân-f-b''' ('''kanafab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:luck|luck]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-f-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:luck|luck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-f-b
|-
! Lemma
| kanafab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinafab|thinafab]] || [[word:jinafab|jinafab]] || [[word:shinafab|shinafab]] || [[word:kinafab|kinafab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunafab|thuthunafab]] || [[word:jujunafab|jujunafab]] || [[word:shushunafab|shushunafab]] || [[word:kukunafab|kukunafab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunafab|thunafab]] || [[word:junafab|junafab]] || [[word:shunafab|shunafab]] || [[word:kunafab|kunafab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunafab|thunafab]] || [[word:junafab|junafab]] || [[word:shunafab|shunafab]] || [[word:kunafab|kunafab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenafab|thenafab]] || [[word:jenafab|jenafab]] || [[word:shenafab|shenafab]] || [[word:kenafab|kenafab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonafab|thothonafab]] || [[word:jojonafab|jojonafab]] || [[word:shoshonafab|shoshonafab]] || [[word:kokonafab|kokonafab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonafab|thonafab]] || [[word:jonafab|jonafab]] || [[word:shonafab|shonafab]] || [[word:konafab|konafab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonafab|thonafab]] || [[word:jonafab|jonafab]] || [[word:shonafab|shonafab]] || [[word:konafab|konafab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnafab|thĂŠnafab]] || [[word:jĂŠnafab|jĂŠnafab]] || [[word:shĂŠnafab|shĂŠnafab]] || [[word:kĂŠnafab|kĂŠnafab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanafab|thathanafab]] || [[word:jajanafab|jajanafab]] || [[word:shashanafab|shashanafab]] || [[word:kakanafab|kakanafab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanafab|thanafab]] || [[word:janafab|janafab]] || [[word:shanafab|shanafab]] || [[word:kanafab|kanafab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanafab|thanafab]] || [[word:janafab|janafab]] || [[word:shanafab|shanafab]] || [[word:kanafab|kanafab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanafab|shanafab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanafab|goshanafab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanafab|gokishanafab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanafabnĂŒ|shanafabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanafabnknĂŒ|goshanafabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanafabnĂŒ|gokishanafabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanafabshĂ«|shanafabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanafabnkshĂ«|goshanafabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanafabshĂ«|gokishanafabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanafabro|shanafabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanafabnkro|goshanafabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanafabro|gokishanafabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanafabmu|shanafabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanafabnkmu|goshanafabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanafabmu|gokishanafabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanafabsher|shanafabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanafabnksher|goshanafabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanafabsher|gokishanafabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanafabng|shanafabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanafabnkng|goshanafabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanafabng|gokishanafabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanafabya|shanafabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanafabnkya|goshanafabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanafabya|gokishanafabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanafabyam|shanafabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanafabnkyam|goshanafabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanafabyam|gokishanafabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanafabnĂŒshĂ«|shanafabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanafabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanafabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanafabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanafabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanafabnĂŒro|shanafabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanafabnknĂŒro|goshanafabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanafabnĂŒro|gokishanafabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanafabnĂŒmu|shanafabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanafabnknĂŒmu|goshanafabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanafabnĂŒmu|gokishanafabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanafabshĂ«nĂŒ|shanafabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanafabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanafabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanafabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanafabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanafabshĂ«ro|shanafabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanafabnkshĂ«ro|goshanafabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanafabshĂ«ro|gokishanafabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanafabshĂ«mu|shanafabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanafabnkshĂ«mu|goshanafabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanafabshĂ«mu|gokishanafabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanafabronĂŒ|shanafabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanafabnkronĂŒ|goshanafabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanafabronĂŒ|gokishanafabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanafabroshĂ«|shanafabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanafabnkroshĂ«|goshanafabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanafabroshĂ«|gokishanafabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanafabromu|shanafabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanafabnkromu|goshanafabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanafabromu|gokishanafabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanafabmunĂŒ|shanafabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanafabnkmunĂŒ|goshanafabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanafabmunĂŒ|gokishanafabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanafabmushĂ«|shanafabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanafabnkmushĂ«|goshanafabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanafabmushĂ«|gokishanafabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanafabmuro|shanafabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanafabnkmuro|goshanafabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanafabmuro|gokishanafabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
